rows.label: qev075501_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hm... Are you of the BLADE? If
so, you should be careful too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0002
rows.name:
The villain who defeated Ni Gombe, the captain
of my squad... It seems he attacks indiscriminately,
whether they are Earthlings or Lars.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_JNK0010
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev075501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask what happened so you can plan a countermeasure.

rows.label: qev075501_JNK0020
rows.name: Boast

rows.label: qev075501_SEL0021
rows.name: Boldly state that no matter who attacks, they are no match for you.

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hmm... Your caution is an important
talent for a warrior. I will tell
you everything I know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Recently, soldiers passing near
NLA have been attacked one after
another by an unknown assailant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0005
rows.name:
When we investigated who it
could be... Rumors reached us
that the villain was a Lars.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0006
rows.name:
If that is the case, we could not let it be,
so I sent Ni Gombe, but he was defeated before
even confirming the assailant's identity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0007
rows.name:
That's right... BLADEs also
excel at this kind of investigation
mission, don't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0008
rows.name:
I will make sure you are properly
rewarded. If you are interested, could
you go and see who this person is?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0009
rows.name:
I heard even those riding in Dolls were
taken down in the blink of an eye...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0010
rows.name:
To boast even after hearing that... I don't
know if you're just a fool or a true
champion, but you are an interesting one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0011
rows.name:
That's right... Say, if you don't mind,
could you go and see who that person is?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0012
rows.name:
Among those who caught a glimpse of him,
some said the villain was a Lars...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0013
rows.name:
If that is the case, we cannot let it be. I
will make sure you are properly rewarded.
How about it, won't you take on this job?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0014
rows.name:
I am grateful... Actually, if that
villain is indeed a Lars, I have
one idea who it might be...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0015
rows.name:
If that is the case... Even if it means
exposing this old body to danger, I
must go and ask for his reasons.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_JNK0030
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev075501_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell Go Rogan you will quickly uncover their true identity, reassuring him.

rows.label: qev075501_JNK0040
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev075501_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask for details about Go Rogan's idea of who it might be.

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0016
rows.name:
Hehe, you are reliable. It seems the
rumor that BLADE is a gathering of
brave individuals was true after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0017
rows.name:
Then, please go to the summit of
Headwater Rock where Ni Gombe was
attacked. He might still be there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0018
rows.name:
I'm sorry... If my assumption is
wrong, I will have tarnished the
name of our benefactors...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0019
rows.name:
Until the truth is known, I cannot voice
that name based on mere speculation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Anyway, please go to the summit
of Headwater Rock where Ni Gombe was
attacked. He might still be there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0021
rows.name:
No matter what kind of person
that villain is, he remains an
exceptionally strong fighter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0022
rows.name:
Make as much preparation as
possible before heading to the
summit of Headwater Rock.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0023
rows.name:
I heard everything from Gi Zang. Since
the rumor spoke of such a strong Lars,
I thought it might be him, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0024
rows.name:
To think it was truly him! Hah! And to
have defeated all those fierce fighters
merely as part of his training![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0025
rows.name:
What a heroic tale, isn't it? It
truly proclaims that the Hundred
Hellions are alive and well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_JNK0050
rows.name: Interest

rows.label: qev075501_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask for details about his relationship with Gi Zang.

rows.label: qev075501_JNK0060
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev075501_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask for the reason why Go Rogan seems so amused.

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0026
rows.name:
When I learned that the survivor of the
Hundred Hellions had come to Mira on our
ship, I went out of my way to meet him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0027
rows.name:
Later, when he told Lord Derg he was going
on a training journey and bolted from the
army, I thought he had lost his mind...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0028
rows.name:
Look at him! He has completely acquired strength
worthy of that name. Even the Hundred Hellions
who ascended to heaven must be rejoicing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0029
rows.name:
In the past, he was still a greenhorn
who couldn't be called worthy of
the Hundred Hellions' name.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0030
rows.name:
Look at him! He has completely acquired
strength worthy of that name.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0031
rows.name:
The Hundred Hellions have been
completely revived. Could there be
anything more delightful than this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0032
rows.name:
Hehe, as thanks for reuniting me with
him like this, please accept this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0033
rows.name:
...But you know, I... I injured your
subordinates pretty badly, didn't I? Is it
really okay for you to forgive me so easily?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0034
rows.name:
You were training, were you
not? Then it also served as
good practice for Ni Gombe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0035
rows.name:
Let me see... If you wish to atone
for something, could you train my
subordinates again sometime?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0036
rows.name:
...Yeah! If something like that is
fine, as many times as you want![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0037
rows.name:
Whoa! We get to be taught warfare
by a legendary Hundred Hellion! That
sounds like a dream come true![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0038
rows.name:
That's right, [ST:playername], wasn't it? Since you went through
the trouble of getting to know a Hundred Hellion,
why don't you have him train you as well?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_JNK0070
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev075501_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Gi Zang if he wants to go another round.

rows.label: qev075501_JNK0080
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev075501_SEL0081
rows.name: Decline, stating you have fought him plenty of times already.

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0039
rows.name:
Please spare me for now. I need to
gain more power... Because there's
no way I can beat you right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0040
rows.name:
I'm good for a while too. But
I'll gain more power... And
someday I'll definitely beat you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0041
rows.name:
...What! You defeated Gi
Zang...!? That's impossible...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0042
rows.name:
It's frustrating, but it's true. I haven't
won against this person even once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075501_MSG0043
rows.name:
Mmm... The universe is vast... indeed. To think
there is a warrior who surpasses the strongest
Hundred Hellion... That is an astonishing tale...[ST:wait ]
